cantDeleteOtherUsers: Only admin can delete other users.
cantEditOtherUsersHabits: Users can only edit their own habits.
noRefreshToken: Failed to refresh login session. No RT in request.
userNameValidationMsg: User name should not contain any whitespace, and be composed of 4 to 15 characters.
habitFrequencyTypeInvalid: Frequency type must be daily, weekly, or monthly.

habitDayOfWeekInvalid: Day of week must be between 0 and 6.
habitDayOfMonthInvalid: Day of month must be between 1 and 31.
